apt.title: Debian / Ubuntu — APT
apt.description: Add the apt.haex.space repository. Supports amd64 and arm64.

dnf.title: Fedora / RHEL / Rocky / Alma — DNF/YUM
dnf.description: Add the rpm.haex.space repository. Supports x86_64 and aarch64.

zypper.title: openSUSE — Zypper
zypper.description: Add the rpm.haex.space repository to zypper.

pacman.title: Arch / Manjaro / EndeavourOS — Pacman
pacman.description: Add the arch.haex.space repository. Supports x86_64 and aarch64 (Arch Linux ARM).
